description: Monitors Istio service mesh traffic, latency, error rates and control plane health using the standard Istio Prometheus metrics.
title: Istio

e478050c-867a-4245-98c0-e67796e3b1eb.name: namespace
e478050c-867a-4245-98c0-e67796e3b1eb.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'

ad42ac2b-5742-4516-8e9f-641997a2be82.name: destination_service
ad42ac2b-5742-4516-8e9f-641997a2be82.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
